summary: The visitor inquired about BMW projects, and Lisa described two BMW-funded initiatives: predictive maintenance for equipment and an AI-driven material planning tool. Lisa offered to provide more details on either project's technical aspects.

The visitor inquired about notable DARPA projects Fraunhofer CMA has worked on, and after being told specific lists weren't available, focused on the AISS project. Lisa explained its unique combination of chip-level security and blockchain asset tracking, along with CMA's testing role.
